title: Cordless Tyre Inflator Air Compressor for Dewalt 18V Battery,150PSI Handheld Tire Pump with Digital Pressure Gauge and LED Light for Cars Motorcycles Bicycles Balls (Tool only,no Battery)
features: 【Expanded Compatibility】Compatible with a wide range of DeWalt 18V Lithium batteries (DCB180, DCB181, DCB182, DCB183, DCB184, DCB200,DCB201-- Battery NOT Included). Enjoy the flexibility of using your existing DeWalt batteries with this air Compressor tyre inflator (Remind :It can not fit for Dewalt Power Stack Battery)

【MULTI-PURPOSE】: The cordless tyre inflator comes with four nozzle adapters to meet most of your inflation needs, making it perfect for cars, SUVs, motorcycles, bicycles, sports balls, and inflatable pool toys.Note: This inflator is not suitable for large truck tyres.

【BIGGER LCD PRESENT MORE】Tire pump include the bigger digital gauge will display both the desired tire pressure value and the current tire pressure and Low battery reminder. The unit of air pressure bar, kPa,KG/CM² and PSI.Air pump for inflatables are four preset modes for you to choose from: car, motorcycle, bicycle, basketball.

【Automatic shut-off & programmable inflation】 Press the "+" and "-" buttons to set the required pressure, which can be set between 20kPa (3PSI) and 1034kPa (150PSI). The car air compressor will automatically switch off when the set pressure is reached. No need to worry about over-inflation

【Three light mode】: Press to turn on the light , switch between low light, normal light, strong light,versatile for various work or outdoor scenes. functions as flashlight, emergency light. Professional design for cordless power source
description: Product Description Cordless Tire Inflator Air pump Compressor is compatible with Dewalt 18v Max Battery，equipped with a built-in LCD display screen, which can monitor the tire pressure in real-time. When the preset air pressure value is reached, it will automatically stop. Specification: Name:Cordless Tire Inflator Compressor Max Air Pressure: 150 PSI Voltage: 18v Hose Length: 65cm Features: Portable,Cordless ,Powerful, Digital Display ,Automatic Shut-Off Power Source: Battery Powered,Suitable for Dewalt 18V Lithium Batteries (Battery is not included) Item Weight: 1.05kg Package included: 1* Cordless Tire Inflator 4* extra nozzles 1* Use Manual Smart Display & Preset Modes: The large LCD screen shows both current and target pressures, along with a low-battery alert. Choose from 4 preset modes: car, motorcycle, bicycle, or basketball, and switch between units (PSI, Bar, kPa, Kg/cm²).easy to operate. Note: not suitable for large truck tires The Cordless Tire Inflator Compressor is designed for dewalt 18V Li-ion batteries (such as DCB180, DCB181, DCB182, DCB183, DCB184, DCB200,DCB201 etc) (Tool Only ,no Battery & Charger) Remind :It can not fit for Dewalt Power Stack Battery Compact design: Size :17x7x23cm Hose Length: 65cm Item Weight: 1.05kg New Design: built-in accessory storage space, can effectively help users to store the pump spare parts Three light mode: Press to turn on the light , switch between low light, normal light, strong light,versatile for various work or outdoor scenes. functions as flashlight, emergency light.
